content: TASK-058 checkpoint done: Diagram tags are now a reusable @archmap/core browser control via createDiagramTags(), exported from the root API and the CDN-friendly subpath @archmap/core/controls/diagram-tags. <archmap-viewer controls>, the dev playground, and examples/demo.html now use the shared control. Package version is bumped to 0.1.1 so npm/jsDelivr can publish the new dist/controls/diagram-tags.js path without overwriting 0.1.0. The previous prototype map full-area layout change is included. Verification: npm run build, npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts test/prototype.test.ts, and localhost smoke for generated tags passed. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
